description: CompositionDark steel round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with matted neck and printed logo on left chestFittingComfortWash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not use fabric softener Use mild detergent only Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Designed to provide you with a perfect Fit and comfortable wear, this polyester t-shirt from adidas wicks sweat away, keeping you fresh and dry throughout. With its dry fit comfort, this tee makes for a perfect wear to the gym, health club and those healthy runs, or simply pair it with shorts or jeans and casual footwear available in a wide range at myntra, for that ultimate in comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
